nasb.text: So Joram slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David; and Ahaziah his son became king in his place.

esv.text: So Joram slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David, and Ahaziah his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 約蘭和他的祖先同睡；人把他埋葬在大衛城和他的祖先一起；他的兒子亞哈謝接續他作王。

ccb.text: 约兰与祖先同眠后，葬在大卫城他的祖坟里。他儿子亚哈谢继位。
